browser.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/149.0.7827.55 Safari/537.36

renderer.mapRender: revision-driven map rebuilds; editable batched Pixi Graphics terrain + raster relief/forest + grid/objects
renderer.zoomMode: requestAnimationFrame-coalesced wheel input anchored under the pointer
renderer.keyboardPan: continuous WASD and arrow-key camera movement synchronized to animation frames
renderer.pointerMode: pointer movement coalesced to one state update per animation frame
renderer.htmlLabels: map labels are HTML overlay, height numbers are hidden until the debug toggle is enabled
renderer.timingNote: sceneUpdateMs/renderMs measure JavaScript scene updates only; global long tasks and long-animation-frame script attribution remain separate diagnostics.
